results.title: JDU Nagaland Youth flays Konsakhul killings
results.description: DIMAPUR: Janata Dal (United) Nagaland State Youth Wing has condemned the recent killing of six innocent Nagas in Manipur, terming the incident a “tragic and senseless act” and a grave violation of humanity and peace.In a statement, JDU Nagaland Youth president Mhao Yanthan said there could be “absolutely no justification for violence against innocent individuals,” [...] The post JDU Nagaland Youth flays Konsakhul killings first appeared on Nagaland Post .
results.source: Nagaland Post - Get The Latest Nagaland News, Brea
